title: Light Fingers
description: The Thieves Guild of Dalhurst operates in the shadows, but they're always looking for new talent. A hooded figure in the market district has noticed your... flexible morals. If you want to join, you'll need to prove you have what it takes. Steal a ledger from a local merchant without getting caught. Simple enough - for someone with light fingers.

objectives.description: Meet the Guild recruiter in the Dalhurst back alleys at night
Scout the merchant's shop during the day
Steal the merchant's ledger without being detected
Deliver the ledger to the Guild contact
